feedback.subtitle: What Our Clients Say
feedback.title: Trusted by delivery businesses across the region
feedback.description: Hear from merchants, logistics companies, and fleet operators who transformed their operations with Trasealio.
feedback.member1Quote: Trasealio transformed our entire delivery operation. We went from scattered spreadsheets and phone calls to a unified command center. Our dispatch team now handles 3x the volume with complete visibility over every driver and every delivery.
feedback.member2Quote: The merchant self-service portal alone saved us dozens of support hours per week. Our merchants can now create shipments, print labels, and track their orders without calling us. Trasealio made us a true multi-merchant platform.
feedback.member3Quote: Route optimization was a game-changer. We reduced fuel costs by 22% and failed deliveries by 35% in the first month. The driver app is intuitive and our team adopted it immediately — no training needed.
feedback.member4Quote: Finally, a delivery platform that understands finance. COD settlement, automated invoicing, wallet management — Trasealio doesn't stop at delivered. It continues through paid, settled, reconciled, and reported. Exactly what we needed.

whyTrasealio.subtitle: WHY TRASEALIO?
whyTrasealio.title: One platform. Every stakeholder. Complete control.

merchantPortal.title: Merchant Portal
merchantPortal.subtitle: Give every merchant a self-service dashboard to manage shipments, invoices, labels, and settlements — no ops team needed.
merchantPortal.overviewText: The Merchant Portal is the front door of Trasealio. Merchants sign in, create single or bulk shipments via CSV upload, print branded shipping labels, and track every order in real time. The portal surfaces COD summaries, invoice history, and payment reconciliation so merchants always know where their money is. With role-based access control, a merchant can invite team members while keeping sensitive financial data locked down. The result: fewer support tickets, faster onboarding, and happier merchants.

highlights.item1: Create shipments one-by-one or bulk-upload via CSV in seconds
highlights.item2: Auto-generate branded shipping labels with barcode & QR
highlights.item3: Real-time order tracking with full status timeline
highlights.item4: COD collection summaries with daily & weekly breakdowns
highlights.item5: Invoice management and downloadable financial reports
highlights.item6: Role-based access — owner, admin, and viewer permissions

useCases.item1: E-commerce stores managing 50+ daily shipments that need a single pane of glass for logistics
useCases.item2: Marketplace sellers who want branded tracking pages and label printing without developer help
useCases.item3: Finance teams that need accurate COD and invoice reconciliation every settlement cycle
useCases.item4: Operations managers onboarding new merchants in under 5 minutes with CSV import

merchantPortal.ctaText: Let them manage shipments, track orders, and reconcile payments — all on their own.

dispatchCenter.title: Dispatch Command Center
dispatchCenter.subtitle: A real-time operations hub where dispatchers assign drivers, manage workloads, and monitor every delivery on a live map.
dispatchCenter.overviewText: The Dispatch Command Center is mission control for your delivery fleet. Dispatchers see every active order, every available driver, and every zone on one screen. Drag-and-drop assignment, auto-dispatch rules, and workload balancing ensure no driver is overloaded and no order is missed. The live map shows driver positions, ETAs, and delivery progress in real time. Timeline views reveal bottlenecks before they become problems, and instant alerts keep the team ahead of exceptions. Whether you run 10 drivers or 10,000, the command center scales with you.

highlights.item1: Live map with real-time driver positions, ETAs, and delivery status
highlights.item2: Drag-and-drop order assignment and auto-dispatch rules
highlights.item3: Workload balancing across drivers and delivery zones
highlights.item4: Pickup and delivery sequence management with timeline view
highlights.item5: Instant exception alerts for delays, failures, and no-shows
highlights.item6: Zone-based filtering and multi-hub operations support

useCases.item1: Dispatch teams coordinating 200+ deliveries per shift across multiple zones
useCases.item2: Fleet managers who need visibility into driver utilization and idle time
useCases.item3: Operations leads identifying bottlenecks and reallocating resources in real time
useCases.item4: Multi-hub businesses that need zone-specific dispatch and unified reporting

dispatchCenter.ctaText: See your entire fleet, assign orders in seconds, and resolve issues before customers notice.

routeOptimization.title: Route Optimization
routeOptimization.subtitle: Intelligent stop sequencing that cuts drive time, saves fuel, and gets every package delivered faster.
routeOptimization.overviewText: Route Optimization in Trasealio goes beyond simple shortest-path calculation. The engine considers delivery windows, vehicle capacity, traffic patterns, and driver history to build the most efficient sequence of stops. Dispatchers see a before-and-after comparison showing time and distance saved. Once approved, the optimized route is pushed directly to the driver app with turn-by-turn next-stop guidance and one-tap navigation to Google Maps or Waze. Route plans are persisted, so you can audit performance and continuously improve. The result: fewer kilometers driven, lower fuel costs, and more deliveries per shift.

highlights.item1: Multi-constraint optimization — time windows, capacity, traffic, and priority
highlights.item2: Before / after comparison showing saved time and distance
highlights.item3: One-tap handoff to Google Maps or Waze for navigation
highlights.item4: Persisted route plans for auditing and continuous improvement
highlights.item5: Driver next-stop guidance with ETA and delivery instructions
highlights.item6: Re-optimization on the fly when orders are added or cancelled

useCases.item1: Delivery fleets looking to reduce fuel costs by 15-25% through smarter sequencing
useCases.item2: Drivers who want clear next-stop directions instead of guessing the best order
useCases.item3: Operations teams managing time-sensitive deliveries with strict delivery windows
useCases.item4: Companies scaling from one city to many that need repeatable, auditable route plans

routeOptimization.ctaText: Cut distances, reduce fuel spend, and hit every delivery window — automatically.

aboutUs.heroTitle: We're building the operating system for modern delivery
aboutUs.heroSubtitle: Trasealio was born from a simple belief: every delivery business deserves enterprise-grade technology — without the enterprise price tag.
aboutUs.storyP1: We watched delivery companies struggle with disconnected tools — spreadsheets for orders, WhatsApp for drivers, manual invoicing for finance. Operations that should take seconds were taking hours.
aboutUs.storyP2: So we built Trasealio: a single platform that connects merchants, dispatchers, drivers, recipients, and finance into one unified workflow. No more scattered tools. No more data silos. Just clarity, speed, and control.
aboutUs.storyP3: Today, Trasealio powers delivery operations across the region — from startups handling 50 orders a day to enterprises managing thousands.
aboutUs.missionText: We exist to democratize delivery technology. Our mission is to give every logistics company — regardless of size — the tools to operate at world-class efficiency.
aboutUs.visionTitle: The future of logistics is connected
aboutUs.visionText: We envision a world where every package is traceable, every route is optimized, every driver is empowered, and every business can scale without friction.
aboutUs.value1Desc: Every delivery, every transaction, every decision — visible and accountable. We believe trust is built through clarity.
aboutUs.value2Desc: We don't just digitize old processes — we reimagine them. From AI-powered routing to real-time settlement, we push boundaries.
aboutUs.value3Desc: Delivery never sleeps, and neither does our platform. Enterprise-grade uptime, security, and performance — always.
aboutUs.value4Desc: We build tools that make people better at their jobs — merchants, dispatchers, drivers, and finance teams alike.
aboutUs.value5Desc: Architected for growth from day one. Multi-tenant SaaS that handles 10 deliveries or 10 million with the same reliability.
aboutUs.value6Desc: Every feature we build starts with a real problem from a real customer. We ship solutions, not features.
aboutUs.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your delivery operations?
aboutUs.ctaText: Start your free trial today and see why leading delivery businesses choose Trasealio.

featuresPage.heroTitle: Everything you need to run delivery operations
featuresPage.heroSubtitle: From order creation to driver settlement — Trasealio covers every step of the delivery lifecycle.
featuresPage.orderMgmtDesc: Create, track, and manage orders with full lifecycle visibility. Support for single orders, bulk imports, and API-based creation.
featuresPage.dispatchDesc: Assign orders to drivers manually or let the system auto-dispatch based on proximity, capacity, and zones.
featuresPage.routingDesc: AI-powered route planning that reduces drive time, saves fuel, and maximizes deliveries per shift.
featuresPage.driverAppDesc: Dedicated driver app with navigation, barcode scanning, proof of delivery, and real-time status updates.
featuresPage.liveTrackingDesc: Real-time GPS tracking for every driver and shipment. Share tracking links with customers automatically.
featuresPage.codDesc: Complete cash-on-delivery reconciliation with driver settlements, collection tracking, and finance reports.
featuresPage.invoicingDesc: Generate client invoices automatically based on delivered orders with PDF export and email delivery.
featuresPage.analyticsDesc: Comprehensive dashboards with delivery metrics, driver performance, revenue insights, and scheduled reports.
featuresPage.clientPortalDesc: Self-service portal for merchants to create orders, track shipments, view invoices, and manage addresses.
featuresPage.barcodeDesc: Generate and scan barcodes for every shipment. Streamline warehouse handoff, sorting, and driver loading.
featuresPage.notificationsDesc: Automated SMS, email, and push notifications for order updates, delivery confirmations, and driver alerts.
featuresPage.multiTenantDesc: Each company gets its own isolated workspace with custom branding, pricing, zones, and configurations.
featuresPage.ctaText: Start your free trial and explore the full platform — no credit card required.

integrationsPage.heroTitle: Connect Trasealio with your entire stack
integrationsPage.heroSubtitle: Seamless integrations with the tools you already use — payments, maps, messaging, and more.
integrationsPage.gridTitle: Built to work with your tools
integrationsPage.ecommerceDesc: Connect with Shopify, WooCommerce, Salla, and Zid to automatically import orders and sync delivery status.
integrationsPage.paymentsDesc: Accept online payments through Stripe, PayTabs, and regional processors with automatic reconciliation.
integrationsPage.smsDesc: Send delivery updates via Twilio, Unifonic, or any SMS provider. Customers stay informed at every step.
integrationsPage.emailDesc: Branded email notifications through your SMTP provider or services like SendGrid and Mailgun.
integrationsPage.mapsDesc: Google Maps and Waze integration for optimized routing, live tracking, and delivery address validation.
integrationsPage.storageDesc: AWS S3 integration for secure storage of delivery photos, signatures, documents, and backups.
integrationsPage.webhooksDesc: Real-time event webhooks that push order status changes, delivery updates, and settlement events to your systems.
integrationsPage.restApiDesc: Full REST API with comprehensive documentation for custom integrations, automation, and third-party apps.
integrationsPage.pushNotifDesc: Web Push and mobile push notifications for real-time driver alerts, dispatch updates, and customer delivery status.
integrationsPage.ctaText: Our APIs and pre-built connectors get you up and running fast.

apiDocsPage.heroSubtitle: RESTful APIs with comprehensive documentation, SDKs, and webhooks for seamless integration.
apiDocsPage.overviewText1: The Trasealio API follows REST conventions with JSON payloads, predictable resource URLs, and standard HTTP status codes. Every endpoint is authenticated via JWT bearer tokens with role-based access control.
apiDocsPage.overviewText2: Whether you're building a custom merchant portal, connecting your ERP system, or automating dispatch workflows — our API gives you full programmatic access to the Trasealio platform.
apiDocsPage.ordersDesc: Create, retrieve, update, and cancel orders. Support for bulk creation, status transitions, and advanced filtering.
apiDocsPage.shipmentsDesc: Track shipment status, get delivery proof, access GPS coordinates, and manage delivery attempts.
apiDocsPage.clientsDesc: Manage merchant accounts, addresses, preferences, and API credentials programmatically.
apiDocsPage.driversDesc: Query driver availability, locations, performance metrics, and manage fleet assignments.
apiDocsPage.webhooksDesc: Register webhook endpoints for real-time event notifications. Supports order, delivery, and payment events.
apiDocsPage.invoicesDesc: Generate, retrieve, and download invoices. Access settlement reports and payment reconciliation data.
apiDocsPage.authText: All API requests require a JWT bearer token in the Authorization header. Tokens are obtained via the login endpoint and include tenant isolation, role-based permissions, and configurable expiration. API tokens for machine-to-machine communication are available on the Enterprise plan.
apiDocsPage.rateLimitText: The API enforces rate limits of 100 requests per minute for standard plans and 1,000 requests per minute for Enterprise plans. Rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset) are included in every response.
apiDocsPage.ctaText: Contact our team for API access and developer support.

securityPage.heroSubtitle: Your data is protected by industry-leading security practices at every layer of the platform.
securityPage.overviewTitle: Security is not an add-on — it's our foundation
securityPage.overviewText: At Trasealio, security is embedded in every line of code, every deployment, and every process. We protect your delivery data, financial records, and customer information with the same rigor expected of enterprise platforms — because every business deserves that level of protection.
securityPage.encryptionDesc: All data is encrypted in transit with TLS 1.3 and at rest with AES-256. API communications use HTTPS exclusively.
securityPage.authDesc: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control. Multi-tenant isolation ensures no cross-tenant data access.
securityPage.infraDesc: Hosted on AWS with VPC isolation, managed databases with automated backups, and infrastructure-as-code deployments.
securityPage.dataProtectionDesc: Automated daily backups with point-in-time recovery. S3 storage with versioning and cross-region replication for critical data.
securityPage.privacyDesc: Minimal data collection, clear consent flows, and GDPR-aligned data handling practices across the platform.
securityPage.monitoringDesc: Continuous security monitoring, anomaly detection, automated alerts, and incident response procedures.
securityPage.complianceText: Trasealio follows industry best practices including OWASP Top 10 protection, regular security audits, dependency scanning, and secure development lifecycle (SDLC) practices. We are committed to maintaining the highest security standards as we grow.
securityPage.ctaText: Our team is happy to discuss our security practices and answer your questions.

privacyPage.heroSubtitle: We are committed to protecting your personal data and being transparent about how we use it.
privacyPage.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Trasealio ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and shares information when you use our delivery management platform and related services.
privacyPage.infoCollectText: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, company name, and delivery addresses. We also collect usage data automatically, including IP addresses, browser type, pages visited, and platform interaction data.
privacyPage.howUseText: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process orders and deliveries, send notifications and updates, generate invoices and reports, provide customer support, and comply with legal obligations.
privacyPage.sharingText: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with service providers (e.g., cloud hosting, payment processors, SMS providers) who help us operate the platform, and with law enforcement when required by law.
privacyPage.cookiesText: We use essential cookies to operate the platform and analytics cookies to understand usage patterns. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacyPage.dataSecurityText: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS 1.3), encryption at rest (AES-256), role-based access control, and regular security audits to protect your data.
privacyPage.retentionText: We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.
privacyPage.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data. You may also object to or restrict certain processing activities. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@trasealio.com.
privacyPage.childrenText: Our services are not directed to children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
privacyPage.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through the platform.
privacyPage.contactText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at privacy@trasealio.com or write to Trasealio, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

termsPage.heroSubtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the Trasealio platform.
termsPage.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Trasealio delivery management platform and related services provided by Trasealio ("we", "us", or "our").
termsPage.acceptanceText: By accessing or using Trasealio, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you may not use our services. If you are using Trasealio on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.
termsPage.servicesText: Trasealio provides a cloud-based delivery management platform including order management, dispatch, driver management, live tracking, invoicing, analytics, and related features as described on our website.
termsPage.accountsText: You must create an account to use Trasealio. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must provide accurate and complete registration information.
termsPage.usageText: You agree not to: (a) use the platform for illegal purposes, (b) attempt to gain unauthorized access to other accounts or systems, (c) interfere with the platform's operation, (d) reverse engineer or scrape the platform, or (e) transmit harmful code or content.
termsPage.intellectualPropertyText: The Trasealio platform, including all software, designs, content, and documentation, is owned by us and protected by intellectual property laws. Your subscription grants you a limited, non-exclusive license to use the platform.
termsPage.paymentText: Paid plans are billed monthly or annually as selected. Payments are non-refundable except as required by law. We may change pricing with 30 days' notice. Failure to pay may result in service suspension.
termsPage.limitationText: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Trasealio's total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the 12 months preceding the claim. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
termsPage.terminationText: Either party may terminate the agreement at any time. Upon termination, your access to the platform will cease. You may export your data within 30 days of termination. We may terminate for cause if you violate these Terms.
termsPage.governingText: These Terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Dubai, UAE.
termsPage.changesText: We may modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or platform notification at least 30 days before taking effect.
termsPage.contactText: For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@trasealio.com or write to Trasealio, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
